summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Telegram Moderation Bot with web status page. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly.
passed_tests: Backend API GET /api/ returns correct root message
Backend API GET /api/bot/status returns online status with uptime
Backend API GET /api/bot/stats returns correct stat structure with all fields
Backend API GET /api/bot/commands returns all 8 command categories with correct counts
Frontend loads with CASPERMODBOT header title
Frontend displays ONLINE status badge with green pulsing dot
Frontend shows 4 stat cards (Uptime, Commands, Groups, Version) with live data
Frontend displays 8 accordion sections for all command categories
Accordion sections expand/collapse properly showing individual commands
Footer displays System Online status with owner @casperthe6ix info
All 18 required data-testid attributes present for automation testing
Terminal dark theme with green accent colors (#00ff9d) implemented correctly
JetBrains Mono font applied for terminal aesthetic
Live data integration between frontend and backend working
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (4/4 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (11/11 tests passed)
